_comment: Unified wfb link preset. Install as /etc/wfb-link.json on air and/or ground. EVERY field is optional — a missing or empty file ({}) yields exactly the shipped preset (the link comes up unchanged). The mega binary's `config-env` applet renders this into shell env for the startup script; defaults live in C (multicall/wfb_configenv.c). The values shown below ARE the built-in defaults. Link ids and fec/mcs/peek must match on both ends.

radio._comment: htmode = iw channel WIDTH (RF), honored on both sides: GROUND (gs_supervisor overlay) and AIR (S99wfb). The GROUND should set HT40+ (decodes both 20 and 40 MHz on its primary; pick the channel-correct HT40+/HT40-); the AIR MUST stay HT20 — rtl8812eu has no working HT40 monitor mode, HT40 corrupts its TX. Shipped default HT20 is the air-safe value (this file is unified air+ground). bw = radiotap TX width — keep 20 while the air is HT20.

key._comment: file default is /etc/drone.key on air, /etc/gs.key on ground. If absent at boot, a deterministic shared key is derived from `seed` (INSECURE shared default — replace for production).

links._comment: wfb link ids (must match the GS supervisor). probe_port = the V+2 probe wfb_tx radio port (-p). AIR-only fields: probe_port.

fec._comment: boot values only; link_controller retunes within ~2s

probe._comment: V+2 boundary probe; required for MCS adaptation. false -> link_controller --no-mcs

log._comment: AIR-side only: enables the link_controller in-process SD session logger (writes to /mnt/mmcblk0p1, self-disables if no SD). NOT wired to the ground telemetry logger — ground sqlite telemetry is opt-in via the gs_supervisor.json `telemetry` block (with a non-overlay db path), so this flag never persists anything on a ground overlay rootfs.

venc._comment: auto_wire: air S99wfb sets venc outgoing.server=shm://<shm> if it differs (then SIGHUPs). No effect on ground. AIR-only fields: host (link_controller --venc, the venc HTTP API), safe_startup_kbps (initial bitrate clamp).

failsafe._comment: AIR-only. link_controller uplink-loss watchdog (seconds): drop MCS to mcs_min if no rx_ant heard for this long. Absorbs bursty -k1/-n2 uplink loss; raise if your uplink is lossier. Fractional values allowed.

ports._comment: AIR-only local UDP/control ports. video_ctrl = video wfb_tx control socket (link_controller CMD_SET_FEC/RADIO). uplink_fwd = decoded uplink + rx_ant listener (MCS scoring + WCMD). uplink_rx_stats = diagnostic uplink rx_ant (never feeds MCS). probe_ctrl/probe_feed = probe wfb_tx control + paced feed. Defaults rarely need changing; here for completeness/conflict avoidance.
